classification_routing.justification: processing_meta.json persists no `route` or `inferred_type`, so the route is unrecoverable from logs; however output.md carries per-slide markers (7 slides, one section each) strongly consistent with expected_type=slide_pdf. Supporting metadata is slightly off: summary.language='mixed' vs manifest 'en', and ocr_quality='low' contradicts the actually clean extraction.

text_coverage.justification: Every substantive text block from all 7 source slides is present in output.md, including the lecturer contact 'huonglt@soict.hust.edu.vn', the 70%/30% evaluation split, and the full reference citation ending 'Prentice Hall'.

extraction_fidelity.justification: Characters, digits, and symbols are correct with no garbling; the Vietnamese name 'Lê Thanh Hương' keeps full diacritics (ê, ươ) and the email and em-dash in the book title are preserved exactly.

structure_preservation.justification: Slide boundaries are preserved via '<!-- slide N -->' markers and headings/lists are in correct reading order, but on the Content slide output.md FLATTENS two items that the source and expected nest as sub-bullets under 'Problem Solving'.
evidence: output.md flat: '- Problem Solving\n- Search Algorithms\n- Constraint Satisfaction Problems'
source/expected nest them indented under '- Problem Solving'

faithfulness_no_hallucination.justification: output.md contains only content present in the source slides; no invented text was found. (The stray lowercase 'artificial' in summary.json's concepts list does not appear in output.md.)

formula_table_code.justification: N/A — no formulas, tables, or code in this course-introduction slide deck.

normalization_note: The normalized markdown reads coherently and drops no large spans; all 7 slides are present with '<!-- slide N -->' boundary comments and '#' headings, and content is complete. Only deviations are the flattened sub-bullets on the Content slide and inaccurate summary metadata (language='mixed', ocr_quality='low').
overall_comment: High-quality faithful extraction of a text-native English AI course-intro deck: complete text coverage, correct Vietnamese diacritics, no hallucinations, and slide boundaries preserved. The only real content defect is a list-nesting error on the Content slide (output flattens 'Search Algorithms' / 'Constraint Satisfaction Problems' that the source nests under 'Problem Solving'). Routing is unrecoverable from processing_meta, so pass is judged on consistent slide-type/language signals; metadata labels are slightly off.
